subcodes.first_line: O ye remnants of that martyr in the path of the Peerless Beloved! As the call of His Holiness the Exalted One reached the ears of that martyr [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بازماندگان آن شهید سبیل دلبر یکتا حضرت شهید را چون ندای حضرت اعلی بسمع
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @fulfillment of true potential, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
